name: m3-memory
description: Local-first agentic memory layer for MCP agents — 100+ tools, hybrid search, contradiction detection, cross-device sync, GDPR-ready. 100% local, no cloud APIs.
//tools: The full, authoritative tool list is generated from bin/mcp_tool_catalog.py — see docs/tools/MCP_CATALOG.json and docs/MCP_TOOLS.md. A hardcoded array here (previously 25 stale names) drifts silently, so it is intentionally not duplicated.
